query: SELECT ac.id, ac.comentario, ac.createdAt, u.name as autor_name, u.role as autor_role FROM adjustment_comments ac LEFT JOIN users u ON ac.autorId = u.id WHERE ac.adjustmentRequestId = 21 ORDER BY ac.createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT ac.id, ac.comentario, ac.createdAt, u.name as autor_name, u.role as autor_role FROM adjustment_comments ac LEFT JOIN users u ON ac.autorId = u.id WHERE ac.adjustmentRequestId = 21 ORDER BY ac.createdAt DESC;
